sections.paragraph:
to spread over, to daub, as a wall with plaster, Lev 14:42 1Ch 29:4 followed by two accus. -Eze. 13:1015 ; 22:28 as eyes that they may not see, Isa 44:18. (Arab. طاخ Med. Ye II. to cover over with fat, see Kamûs, p. 328. Compare in the western languages, τέγγω, tingo, tünchen.) Isaiah loc. cit. the pret. is טַח for טָח (as if from טָחַח).

Niphal pass. Lev 14:43, 48 Lev 14:48.

Derivatives, טִיחַ, טֻחֹות.
